availability.title: Availability

items.question: What types of projects do you work on?
items.answer: I specialize in BIM implementation, process automation, and digital transformation projects for construction and engineering firms.

items.question: How do you manage remote collaboration?
items.answer: I use cloud-based BIM platforms, modern project management tools, and maintain regular communication to ensure smooth and efficient workflows.

items.question: What is the typical project timeline?
items.answer: Depending on the project complexity, timelines usually range from one month to over six months. A clear schedule is defined during the initial phase.

items.question: Do you offer training or workshops?
items.answer: Yes, I provide customized BIM and automation workshops tailored to the team's size and experience level.
